title: PNG Vulnerabilities Allow Attackers to Trigger Process Crashes, Leak Sensitive I

scripts.content: SecRule REQUEST_HEADERS:Host "@rx gmail\.com" "id:370001,phase:1,deny,status:403,msg:'CDB APEX Block: thr-62289673917d'"

| CDB APEX v37.0 Threat Hunt Query
index=* ((query IN ("gmail.com"))) | stats count by src_ip, dest_ip, action | sort -count
